languages.text: {n}Дунавски поднимает руку с протезом-когтями и некоторое время ее рассматривает:{/n} "Так точно, Ваша Светлость. В память о валанциусских дарах. Себериан фон Валанциус устроил массовое усиление полка протезами. Когда он погиб, а мы оказались заперты на Заркове, лишь благодаря аугментациям и протезам наши предки сумели выжить. Без обслуживания почтенных Адептус Механикус аугментика пришла в негодность, но мы выучили урок и делаем, что можем, заменяя утраченное".

{n}Dunawski raises her prosthetic clawed hand and examines it for a time.{/n} "Correct, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, they are. In remembrance of the von Valancius gifts. Seberian von Valancius used prosthetics to make the entire regiment stronger. When he died and we were trapped on Zarkov, it was only because of augments and prosthetics that our ancestors were able to survive. Without the maintenance of the esteemed Adeptus Mechanicus, our augments fell into disrepair. But we have learned, and now we do what we can to replace what is lost."
languages.original_text: {n}Дунавски поднимает руку с протезом-когтями и некоторое время ее рассматривает:{/n} "Так точно, Ваша Светлость. В память о валанциусских дарах. When he died and we were trapped on Zarkov, it was only because of augments and prosthetics that our ancestors were able to survive. Without the maintenance of the esteemed Adeptus Mechanicus, our augments fell into disrepair. But we have learned, and now we do what we can to replace what is lost."

Seberian von Valancius used prosthetics to make the entire regiment stronger. {n}Dunawski raises her prosthetic clawed hand and examines it for a time.{/n} "Correct, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, they are. In remembrance of the von Valancius gifts. Seberian, when he requisitioned a regiment of beggarly, ragged penal soldiers, went to great lengths to improve the First Call-Up's prospects. He personally secured and paid for mass augmentation. When Lord Seberian died and we were trapped on Zarkov, it was only because of their augments that our ancestors were able to survive. Alas, without the maintenance of the esteemed Adeptus Mechanicus, the augments fell into disrepair. But we have learned, and now we do what we can."

languages.text: {n}ダナウスキは義手の手を挙げ、しばらくの間それを観察する。{/n}「正しい、御{mf|尊|殿}、そうなのです。フォン・ヴァランキウスの贈り物への感謝です。セベリアンは、貧しい、ぼろぼろの刑務兵を徴用した時、第1次召集の将来を良くするために尽力しました。彼は個人で大量の増幅装置を確保し、支払いました。セベリアン卿が亡くなり、我々はザルコフに閉じ込められた時、増幅装置のおかげで、我々の祖先たちは生き残ることができました。残念ながら、高貴な機械神殿の維持がなければ、増幅装置は故障しました。しかし、我々は学んだのです。そして、今できることをしています」
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski raises her prosthetic clawed hand and examines it for a time.{/n} "Correct, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, they are. In remembrance of the von Valancius gifts. Seberian, when he requisitioned a regiment of beggarly, ragged penal soldiers, went to great lengths to improve the First Call-Up's prospects. He personally secured and paid for mass augmentation. When Lord Seberian died and we were trapped on Zarkov, it was only because of their augments that our ancestors were able to survive. Alas, without the maintenance of the esteemed Adeptus Mechanicus, the augments fell into disrepair. But we have learned, and now we do what we can."

languages.text: {n}Dunawski lève la prothèse griffue qui remplace sa main et l'examine pendant quelques instants.{/n} « C'est exact, Votre Seigneurie. En hommage aux dons des von Valancius. Seberian von Valancius s'est servi de prothèses pour renforcer l'intégralité du régiment. Lorsque nos ancêtres se sont retrouvés piégés sur Zarkov après sa mort, c'est uniquement grâce à leurs augmentations et à leurs prothèses qu'ils ont réussi à survivre. Sans la maintenance de l'honorable Adeptus Mechanicus, celles-ci ont fini par s'abîmer, mais nous avons appris, et aujourd'hui, nous sommes en mesure de les remplacer. »
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski raises her prosthetic clawed hand and examines it for a time.{/n} "Correct, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, they are. In remembrance of the von Valancius gifts. Seberian von Valancius used prosthetics to make the entire regiment stronger. When he died and we were trapped on Zarkov, it was only because of augments and prosthetics that our ancestors were able to survive. Without the maintenance of the esteemed Adeptus Mechanicus, our augments fell into disrepair. But we have learned, and now we do what we can to replace what is lost."

Seberian von Valancius s'est servi de prothèses pour renforcer l'intégralité du régiment. Lorsque nos ancêtres se sont retrouvés piégés sur Zarkov après sa mort, c'est uniquement grâce à leurs augmentations et à leurs prothèses qu'ils ont réussi à survivre. Sans la maintenance de l'honorable Adeptus Mechanicus, celles-ci ont fini par s'abîmer, mais nous avons appris, et aujourd'hui, nous sommes en mesure de les remplacer. »

languages.text: {n}Dunawski, protez pençeli elini kaldırıp bir süre inceliyor.{/n} "Doğrudur {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, öyle. Von Valancius hediyelerinin anısına. Seberian von Valancius, tüm alayı daha güçlü hâle getirmek için protezler kullandı. Kendisi ölüp biz Zarkov'da mahsur kaldığımızda atalarımız, ogmentleri ve protezleri sayesinde hayatta kalabildi. Ne yazık ki saygıdeğer Adeptus Mechanicus'un bakımı olmadan ogmentlerimiz bozuldu. Fakat biz öğrendik ve kaybettiklerimizin yerine yenilerini yerine koymak için şimdi elimizden geleni yapıyoruz."
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski raises her prosthetic clawed hand and examines it for a time.{/n} "Correct, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, they are. In remembrance of the von Valancius gifts. Seberian von Valancius used prosthetics to make the entire regiment stronger. When he died and we were trapped on Zarkov, it was only because of augments and prosthetics that our ancestors were able to survive. Without the maintenance of the esteemed Adeptus Mechanicus, our augments fell into disrepair. But we have learned, and now we do what we can to replace what is lost."

Seberian von Valancius, tüm alayı daha güçlü hâle getirmek için protezler kullandı. Kendisi ölüp biz Zarkov'da mahsur kaldığımızda atalarımız, ogmentleri ve protezleri sayesinde hayatta kalabildi. Ne yazık ki saygıdeğer Adeptus Mechanicus'un bakımı olmadan ogmentlerimiz bozuldu. Fakat biz öğrendik ve kaybettiklerimizin yerine yenilerini yerine koymak için şimdi elimizden geleni yapıyoruz."

languages.text: {n}Dunawski hebt ihre prothetische Klauenhand und betrachtet sie eine Weile.{/n} "Korrekt, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. In Erinnerung an die Valancius-Gaben. Seberian von Valancius hat das gesamte Regiment mit Prothesen stärker gemacht. Als er starb und wir auf Zarkov in der Falle saßen, konnten unsere Vorfahren nur dank ihrer Augmentationen und Prothesen überleben. Ohne die Wartung des geschätzten Adeptus Mechanicus verwahrlosten unsere Augmentationen allerdings. Aber wir haben gelernt und tun mittlerweile was wir können, um für Ersatz zu sorgen."
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski raises her prosthetic clawed hand and examines it for a time.{/n} "Correct, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, they are. In remembrance of the von Valancius gifts. Seberian von Valancius used prosthetics to make the entire regiment stronger. When he died and we were trapped on Zarkov, it was only because of augments and prosthetics that our ancestors were able to survive. Without the maintenance of the esteemed Adeptus Mechanicus, our augments fell into disrepair. But we have learned, and now we do what we can to replace what is lost."

Seberian von Valancius hat das gesamte Regiment mit Prothesen stärker gemacht. Als er starb und wir auf Zarkov in der Falle saßen, konnten unsere Vorfahren nur dank ihrer Augmentationen und Prothesen überleben. Ohne die Wartung des geschätzten Adeptus Mechanicus verwahrlosten unsere Augmentationen allerdings. Aber wir haben gelernt und tun mittlerweile was wir können, um für Ersatz zu sorgen."

languages.text: {n}Dunawski alza su garra protésica y la examina durante unos momentos.{/n} «Así es, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Es en honor al regalo de los von Valancius. Seberian usó prótesis para reforzar al regimiento entero. Tras su muerte, cuando quedamos atrapados en Zarkov, fueron esos aumentos y prótesis los que aseguraron la supervivencia de nuestros antepasados. Sin el mantenimiento del estimado Adeptus Mechanicus, los aumentos se fueron averiando, pero hemos aprendido y hacemos lo que podemos para sustituir las pérdidas».
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski raises her prosthetic clawed hand and examines it for a time.{/n} "Correct, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, they are. In remembrance of the von Valancius gifts. Seberian von Valancius used prosthetics to make the entire regiment stronger. When he died and we were trapped on Zarkov, it was only because of augments and prosthetics that our ancestors were able to survive. Without the maintenance of the esteemed Adeptus Mechanicus, our augments fell into disrepair. But we have learned, and now we do what we can to replace what is lost."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawski alza su garra protésica y la examina durante unos momentos.{/n} «Así es, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Es en honor al regalo de los von Valancius. Seberian usó prótesis para reforzar al regimiento entero. Tras su muerte, cuando quedamos atrapados en Zarkov, fueron esos aumentos y prótesis los que aseguraron la supervivencia de nuestros antepasados. Sin el mantenimiento del estimado Adeptus Mechanicus, los aumentos se fueron averiando, pero hemos aprendido y hacemos lo que podemos para sustituir las pérdidas».

languages.text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡抬起她那只带爪的义体，端详了片刻。{/n}“没错，舰长大人，确实如此。这都是为了纪念冯·瓦兰修斯的馈赠。塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯用义体让整个军团变得更强。他死后，我们被困在扎尔科夫，正是靠着这些植入物和义体，我们的先辈才活了下来。由于没有尊贵的机械修会的维护，我们的植入物逐渐损毁。但我们学会了自己动手，现在正尽力修补替代那些损毁的部分。”
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski raises her prosthetic clawed hand and examines it for a time.{/n} "Correct, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, they are. In remembrance of the von Valancius gifts. Seberian von Valancius used prosthetics to make the entire regiment stronger. When he died and we were trapped on Zarkov, it was only because of augments and prosthetics that our ancestors were able to survive. Without the maintenance of the esteemed Adeptus Mechanicus, our augments fell into disrepair. But we have learned, and now we do what we can to replace what is lost."
